name: Hangzhou Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Hangzhou coverage with a focus on West Lake pacing, tea culture, and district decisions that keep the city calm rather than repetitive.
fullBio: The Hangzhou Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Hangzhou. Its focus is helping readers use West Lake, tea-country detours, museums, and neighborhood choices in a way that keeps the trip calm, scenic, and still practical to move through.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for scenic pacing, district fit, and whether the guidance still reflects practical Hangzhou travel conditions.
seoTitle: Hangzhou Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Hangzhou guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
